member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Explorer.Adapters.AvailableBudgetQuery
member.summary: Input query for request available budget information.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Explorer.Adapters.BudgetReportType
member.summary: Enumeration values that describe budget reports.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Explorer.Adapters.BudgetExplorerQuery
member.summary: Input query DTO used to explore budget information.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Explorer.Adapters.BudgetExplorerQueryMapper
member.summary: Maps BudgetExplorerQuery DTO structures to BudgetExplorerCommand instances.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Explorer.Adapters.BudgetExplorerResultDto
member.summary: Dynamic columns output DTO with budget information.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Explorer.Adapters.BudgetExplorerResultMapper
member.summary: Maps a BudgetExplorerResult instance to its output DTO.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Explorer.Adapters.DynamicBudgetExplorerEntryDto
member.summary: Output DTO with budget explorer entry information.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Explorer.Data.BudgetExplorerDataService
member.summary: Provides data access services for the budget explorer.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Explorer.BudgetBreakdown
member.summary: Builds budget information for a budget account break down by months.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Explorer.BudgetDataInColumns
member.summary: Value type that holds budget data in columns.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Explorer.BudgetExplorer
member.summary: Retrieves budget information bases on a query returning a dynamic result data structure.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Explorer.BudgetExplorerCommand
member.summary: Command information used by the BudgetExplorer.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Explorer.BudgetExplorerResult
member.summary: Holds the dynamic result of a budget explorer execution.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Explorer.UseCases.BudgetExplorerUseCases
member.summary: Use cases for retrieve budget information.
